column1: WAREHOUSE SNAPSHOT  —  paste the latest capacity dashboard here. Column A must use REPORT labels (e.g., 'Dammam Port', 'Jubail Total') so Section 4 finds them via VLOOKUP. Empty rows (Subcontractor, etc.) return 0 and are fine. Jubail tip: as soon as you fill Jubail 1 and Jubail 2 individually, Section 4 auto-switches to split mode and ignores the Jubail Total row.

Methodology: chamber-summed math is now the source of truth. Total Locations & Capacity tie cleanly to the system rollup (39,324 / 64,800). Occupied & Sellable use chamber sums (21,847 / 42,953) — the system's Total view counts ~10,854 more pallets as Occupied that the chamber view classifies as Sellable. Committed (13,157) and Shortfall (10,498) are warehouse-level metrics — parked on Jubail 1's row so Row 30 sums correctly. Blocked (146) & Virtual (144) likewise live on Jubail 1's row in the main snapshot table.
